'''Erysthes''', located in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] in the [[Tingel Arm/Legends|Tingel Arm]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], was the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] to which the [[Chak-root/Legends|chak-root]] was native.

{{Planet-stub}}
